dev.jeka.core.api.system

Class JkProcHandler

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.system.JkProcHandler

  • public class JkProcHandler
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents a handler for a running process. This class provides methods to interact with the process.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getOutput()
      Returns the output generated by the process.
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> getOutputMultiline()
      Returns the output generated by the executed process as a list of strings.
      java.lang.Process getProcess()
      Returns the process associated with this handler.
      boolean hasCollectedOutput()
      Returns true if the executed process has collected output.
      int waitFor() 
      boolean waitFor(long timeout, java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit timeUnit) 

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • getProcess

        public java.lang.Process getProcess()
        Returns the process associated with this handler.

      • hasCollectedOutput

        public boolean hasCollectedOutput()
        Returns true if the executed process has collected output.

        To collect output, process has to be configured explicitly by invoking JkAbstractProcess.setCollectStdout(boolean).

      • getOutput

        public java.lang.String getOutput()
        Returns the output generated by the process.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the process has not collected output

      • getOutputMultiline

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> getOutputMultiline()
        Returns the output generated by the executed process as a list of strings.

      • waitFor

        public int waitFor()

      • waitFor

        public boolean waitFor(long timeout,
                       java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit timeUnit)
